---
title: "ascatc_4hr_functions.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../ascat.html)

Shared functions for ASCAT-C 4-hour ingestion and derived wind products.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/ascat/src/ascatc_4hr_functions.py >}}
```

:::
